# Everware

> Everware is a Dutch custom software agency building bespoke software, AI solutions and autonomous agents — with personal attention, built for stability and maintainability. Site: https://everware.nl (Dutch, canonical) and https://everware.nl/en/ (English).

Everware works for organizations that hit the limits of off-the-shelf software. One small team covers the full stack — from process analysis to years of maintenance — and starts from the client's process, not from a ready-made product. Clients own the code and the data. Working since 2014.

## Services

- Process optimization: mapping processes and stripping out the noise before building anything (analysis, workflows, automation).
- Design & architecture: a foundation designed to grow with the client — considered, built for stability, not for haste (system design, roadmap, UX).
- Custom software: applications, platforms and internal tools built fully around the client's processes (native, web & mobile, internal tools, integrations).
- AI solutions: custom AI that fits the client's data and processes — no demos, but something that reaches production (LLM applications, RAG, custom models).
- Autonomous agents: agents that take work off your hands — reliable, controllable, with a human at the helm (workflows, tool-use, orchestration).
- Advisory: independent, objective thinking on the right choices (second opinion, strategy, guidance).

## Capabilities

One team that masters the full stack — from foundation to autonomous agent — and stays with the client. No standard packages, no compromises. Built for stability, maintainability and reliability.

- Backend: Python · PHP · Node · Java or Kotlin · Go · C++ · Rust
- Frontend: React or Next · Vue or Nuxt · PWA · Web Components · WASM · React Native or Expo · iOS · Android
- AI & ML: LLMs · RAG · Generative AI · fine-tuning · custom models
- Agents: workflows · tool-use · orchestration
- Cloud & infra: Fly.io · Render · Railway · Vercel · Vultr · DigitalOcean · GCP · AWS · CI/CD
- Data: pipelines · integrations · dashboards · MySQL · PostgreSQL · Supabase

## Why Everware

Off-the-shelf software forces your process; Everware improves your process. Most tools are built for the average customer — nothing about a given client is average. Everware starts from the client's process and builds around it. Compared to off-the-shelf software:

- Software adapts to the client's process — and actively improves it (vs. bending the process to fit the software).
- Only what the client needs, nothing more (vs. paying for features never used).
- One fixed team that knows the client by name (vs. a helpdesk that doesn't know them).
- The client owns the code and the data (vs. vendor lock-in and hidden limits).
- Transparent — the client follows along continuously (vs. a black box).

## How we work

Introduction call → brainstorm → on-site process inventory ("over coffee") → design & architecture → build (test-driven, AI-driven, short visible iterations) → maintenance & evolution. Approach: personal, involved, accelerated Agile.

## FAQ

- What does Everware do? Builds custom software, AI solutions and autonomous agents — from optimizing processes to designing, building and maintaining the software around them, all under one roof.
- Fixed packages? No and yes. Everything is built to measure around the client's processes, starting from the problem rather than a ready-made product; can connect to existing software when desired.
- Who is it for? Organizations that hit the limits of standard software and need something that truly fits the way they work.
- Which technologies? The full stack — from Python, PHP, Node, Java, Go, C++ and Rust to Vue, React and React Native, with LLMs, RAG and a choice of any AI model. Chosen to fit the client's situation.
- Involvement after delivery? Yes — maintenance and further development are part of it, so the software stays reliable and grows with the client.
- What does a project cost? Depends on what is built; after a no-obligation introductory call, Everware gives a clear picture of scope and investment.

- Experience: working since 2014
- Languages: Dutch (primary), English
